ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size record */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size standard */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size standard */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size standard */,
  "bust_measurement" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hip_measurement" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "shoulder_measurement" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length range */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length range (for pants) */,
  "hip_to_waist_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of hip measurement to waist measurement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the size information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., EU, UK, US) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., Inches, Centimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the size (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the overall fit (1-5) */,
  "sizing_accuracy" INTEGER /* Rating for the accuracy of the size (1-5) */,
  "re_purchase_intent" INTEGER /* Likelihood of repurchasing the same size (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse) */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was reordered */,
  "expected_arrival_date" TEXT /* Expected date of arrival for the next order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Sale price of the item */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being returned */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the guideline */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for the guideline */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the guideline */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the guideline was updated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guidelines_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guidelines_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size related to the chart */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., dress, pants) */,
  "chart_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the size chart image */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the chart was updated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, merchandise planner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
